title: Release 10770: MySQL Config Profile 2026.1
summary: Introduced the 2026.1 MySQL configuration profile with safer defaults for heavier Magento catalogs and improved resource balancing during peak traffic.

title: Control Panel: bulk node restart
summary: Operators can now restart multiple nodes in a single action from the control panel, reducing manual steps during rolling maintenance windows.

title: Hypernode Deploy v4.8.0
summary: Hypernode Deploy 4.8.0 speeds up static content rollout, improves deploy visibility, and reduces rollback friction for larger storefronts.

title: API: webhook signature verification
summary: Webhook payloads now include an HMAC-SHA256 signature header so integrations can verify the authenticity of every event before processing it.

title: Release 10755: Varnish and HAProxy utilities
summary: Added new Varnish and HAProxy utility commands to simplify cache inspection and traffic debugging directly from the platform toolchain.

title: Autoscaling: cooldown period now configurable
summary: The autoscaling cooldown period can now be set per-node plan, giving high-traffic stores finer control over scale-in timing after traffic spikes.

title: Hypernode Deploy v4.7.2
summary: Patch release fixing a rare condition where symlink rotation could leave the previous release directory locked during high-concurrency deploys.

title: MageReport: CVE scanner updated to 2026 ruleset
summary: The MageReport CVE scanner now uses the 2026 vulnerability ruleset, covering newly disclosed Magento and PHP ecosystem issues.

title: Cluster: cross-region failover preview
summary: Early access for cross-region failover lets enterprise clusters designate a secondary region that takes over automatically if the primary becomes unreachable.

title: Release 10647: Two-factor Authentication
summary: Enabled stronger two-factor authentication flows in the control panel to improve account security and reduce administrative access risk.

title: API: pagination added to node list endpoint
summary: The /nodes endpoint now supports cursor-based pagination, making it easier to handle large fleets programmatically without hitting response size limits.

title: Release 10630: PHP 8.3 support
summary: PHP 8.3 is now available on all Hypernode plans. The release includes JIT improvements, typed class constants, and several deprecation cleanups.

title: Hypernode Deploy v4.7.0
summary: Introduces parallel asset compilation and a new --dry-run flag that prints the full deploy plan without executing any steps.

title: Autoscaling: memory pressure metric
summary: Autoscaling decisions can now factor in memory pressure alongside CPU, preventing OOM conditions during catalog import and reindex operations.

title: MageReport: Magento 2.4.7 patch coverage
summary: Scan rules updated to detect missing Magento 2.4.7 security patches, including APSB25-08 and related ACL bypass vectors.

title: Cluster: read replica promotion improvements
summary: Read replica promotion is now faster and produces clearer audit log entries, making post-failover forensics easier for platform engineers.

title: Release 10590: Redis 7.2 default
summary: Redis 7.2 is now the default cache backend on new Hypernode instances, bringing improved memory efficiency and ACL enhancements.

title: API: scoped read-only tokens
summary: Read-only API tokens can now be scoped to specific resources, enabling monitoring integrations without granting unnecessary write access.

title: Control Panel: usage graphs redesign
summary: CPU, memory, and disk usage graphs have been redesigned with higher resolution data points and adjustable time windows up to 90 days.

title: Hypernode Deploy v4.6.0
summary: Adds native support for multi-store Magento setups, allowing a single pipeline to deploy and configure multiple store views in one pass.

title: Release 10550: Elasticsearch 8 support
summary: Elasticsearch 8 is now available as an opt-in search backend, with automatic index migration tooling for stores upgrading from ES 7.

title: MageReport integration refresh
summary: Updated the MageReport integration to surface clearer scan statuses and highlight remediation priorities for Magento stores.

title: Autoscaling: scheduled scale rules
summary: Stores can now pre-schedule scale-up windows for known high-traffic events, ensuring resources are available before demand arrives.

title: Cluster: automated backup verification
summary: Cluster backups are now automatically restored to a sandboxed environment nightly and verified for integrity, reducing silent backup corruption risk.

title: Cluster failover maintenance window improvements
summary: Refined cluster failover orchestration to shorten maintenance windows and provide more predictable node handoff behavior during upgrades.

title: API: OpenAPI 3.1 spec published
summary: The full Hypernode API is now described with an OpenAPI 3.1 specification, available for download and compatible with major code-generation tools.

title: Autoscaling thresholds tuned for flash sale traffic
summary: Adjusted autoscaling thresholds to react faster to short-lived traffic spikes common during campaigns, launches, and flash sales.

title: API tokens gain scoped deployment permissions
summary: API tokens can now be restricted to deployment-related actions, making automation workflows safer for agencies and larger teams.

title: Platform monitoring pipeline refresh
summary: Refreshed the internal monitoring pipeline to improve alert fidelity and reduce noisy notifications during recurring platform events.

title: First public changelog import
summary: Published the first consolidated changelog import for platform updates, creating a permanent timeline for releases and operational changes.
